# Story 1 — Create Account

**As a customer service representative**  
I need to create a customer account  
So that I can store customer details

## Details

- Create a REST API endpoint to add a new customer
- Store customer information in the database

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given valid customer data
- [ ] When I send a POST request to /accounts
- [ ] Then a new account should be created

- [ ] Given invalid data
- [ ] When I send a POST request
- [ ] Then I should receive an error response
